scripts.dev: concurrently "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.setup: cd backend && node seed.js && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose=require('mongoose'); const Team=require('./models/Team'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI).then(async()=>{ await Team.create({teamId:'ADMINISFCR1', teamName:'Game Admin', password:'thekaliusers', firebaseUID:'dev-uid-admin', isAdmin:true, coins:0, priority:1}); console.log('Admin account created!'); process.exit(); }).catch(console.error);" && node setupFirebase.js
